base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_axe_man_throw — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. Axe-throwing knight — 3-frame cycle: wind-up axe overhead / release / recovery. Axe arcs toward Simon. Harder variant of Black Knight. Levels 3, 6. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Axe-throwing knight — 3-frame cycle: wind-up axe overhead / release / recovery. Axe arcs toward Simon. Harder variant of Black Knight. Levels 3, 6
